name: Edge sensor -> central API (store-and-forward)
description: Development-Plan Increment 9 demo: an MQTT sensor reading is forwarded to a central HTTP endpoint; onError:"storeForward" (EDGE-130) durably queues readings on local disk whenever that central connection is unreachable and drains them, in order, once it recovers — so the edge device keeps accepting sensor data through a network outage with zero loss. runtimeAssignment.group targets this flow at the "edge-fab2" fleet group (UI-220/EDGE-120) rather than the central server runtime. Requires a 'sensor-mqtt' connection (type mqtt) in the target project before deploy.
